SHORT NAME: SUBMTG_STATE_PRVDR_ID 

LONG NAME: SUBMTG_STATE_PRVDR_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 30 

FILE(S): All annual provider files 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: Numeric string (e.g., 0000000001, 00000000000036). 

COMMENT: The CCW_APR_LINK_KEY identifies each unique combination of submitting state entity code
